description: Metric definitions for the rigorous echo follow-up study.
load_instructions: Load `metric_definitions.json` as JSON and inspect the documented result rows and metadata.

metric_definitions.best_fit_restricted_process_fidelity: Restricted process fidelity after the framework's best-fit logical block-phase correction.
metric_definitions.leakage_outside_target_mean: Mean population leaked outside the addressed logical subspace.
metric_definitions.max_residual_z_error_rad: Maximum absolute blockwise residual-Z component across addressed manifolds.
metric_definitions.mean_residual_z_error_rad: Mean absolute blockwise residual-Z component extracted from the SU(2) error generator relative to the target block rotation.
metric_definitions.mean_transverse_error_rad: Mean norm of the blockwise transverse error-generator component.
metric_definitions.other_target_population_mean: Mean population transferred into the wrong addressed blocks.
metric_definitions.probe_fidelity_mean: Mean state fidelity over a fixed explicit logical probe set that includes cavity superpositions and fixed random logical states.
metric_definitions.probe_fidelity_min: Worst probe-state fidelity over that explicit logical probe set.
metric_definitions.refocus_target: For the manifold-aware refocusing pulse, the target is blockwise Rx(pi) on every addressed manifold rather than the SQR target.
metric_definitions.restricted_average_gate_fidelity: Average gate fidelity computed from the restricted process fidelity.
metric_definitions.restricted_process_fidelity: Process fidelity between the ideal restricted operator and the actual restricted operator, including block-dependent phase errors.
metric_definitions.same_block_population_mean: Mean retained population inside the correct logical block over basis probes.
metric_definitions.state_transfer_fidelity_mean: Mean fidelity over the framework spanning transfer set.
